items.name_en: Full metal hardware, top-tier original sample, code-changing chip. Gaston-Louis Vuitton's 1932 champagne bag meets contemporary trends, transforming into the NéoNoé bucket bag, embodying heritage beauty. Monogram canvas outlines soft lines, paired with colored leather trim and matching multi-layered glued lining. Monogram coated canvas - smooth calfskin trim - microfiber lining - center zip pocket - detachable, adjustable shoulder strap!!

items.name_en: Full steel hardware 👻 Top-tier original batch 😻 changed code chip 💯 Model: M12099 Black Small Double-sided Shopping Bag ❣️❣️ Neverfull Bandoulière Inside Out BB Handbag. This season's interpretation of a classic double-sided design, featuring the iconic Monogram canvas and grained leather on the front and back. The removable zip pouch can be used alone or hung externally. The detachable shoulder strap allows for crossbody wear, while the dazzling metal hardware adds refined details.

M46740
SAUMUR BB Handbag
Exclusive channel goods, Gemini launch exclusive, pure original quilted fabric + real hardware assembly, European ZP surplus stock
The Saumur BB Handbag is crafted from Monogram canvas, reinterpreting a beloved classic design with a contemporary touch. The saddle bag silhouette and calfskin buckle embody a knightly spirit, while the hidden magnetic closure on the front ensures easy opening. Its compact structure accommodates daily essentials, and the detachable shoulder strap and handle offer versatile carrying options.
Detailed Features

items.name_en: Haiyuan Ex-Factory Exclusive Real Shot] Dynamic Chip M13089 White Color M12925 Monogram. This All InBB Xph Tote features Monogram canvas paired with glossy metal hardware, highlighting a classic style with the iconic lock and nameplate. The adjustable strap continues the brand's trunk-making heritage, while the leather strap adds options for crossbody and shoulder carrying. The foldable design allows for flexible shape adjustment, and the ample space makes it a great daily choice.

items.name_en: HANDBAG EAST WEST Bowling Bag【M13084】White Multicolor (Takashi Murakami)
items.name_cn:
HANDBAG EAST WEST Bowling Bag【M13084】White Multicolor (Takashi Murakami)
This Handbag East West Sj bag is from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami Re-edition series, depicting the full Monogram pattern with the artist's signature rainbow tones. The horizontal silhouette features fluid lines, top handles, nail-studded side straps, a detachable and adjustable shoulder strap, and LV xTM key pouch, all accented with calfskin details. The refined corners pay homage to the brand's traditional trunks.
Size: 27 x 14 x 10 cm

specs.rawTitle:

The horizontal silhouette features fluid lines, top handles, nail-studded side straps, a detachable and adjustable shoulder strap, and LV xTM key pouch, all accented with calfskin details.
